title: Senior Plant Manager at Britannia Industries

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Britannia Industries
jsonLd.description:
Britannia Industries has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Vijayawada office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Britannia Industries:
Britannia Industries is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Britannia Industries!
